tr.td: Oxycodone hydrochloride 10 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Acetaminophen 325 mg and oxycodone hydrochloride 10 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (325 mg/10 mg) by mouth every 4 to 6 hours as needed for pain
Hydrocodone bitartrate 10 mg and ibuprofen 200 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (10 mg/200 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed
Acetaminophen 300 mg and hydrocodone bitartrate 5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (300 mg/5 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed for pain
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Hepatitis B virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Assessment of health and social care needs
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Erythrocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Hematocrit [Volume Fraction] of Blood by Automated count
MCV [Entitic mean volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count
MCHC [Entitic Mass/volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count
Erythrocyte distribution width [Entitic volume] by Automated count
Platelets [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count
